languages.text: "У вас тут свое наречие. Можешь мне его расшифровать?"
"You have your own unique dialect here, it seems. Would you care to translate?"

languages.text: 「ここには独自の専門用語があるようね。翻訳して」
languages.original_text: "You have your own unique jargon here, it seems. Would you care to translate?"

traits.locale_text: 「ここには独自の専門用語があるようですね。翻訳していただけますか？」

languages.text: « Vous employez un dialecte bien particulier sur cette planète. Pouvez-vous traduire ? »
languages.original_text: "You have your own unique dialect here, it seems. Would you care to translate?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous employez un dialecte bien particulier sur cette planète. Pouvez-vous traduire ? »

languages.text: "Burada kendinize has bir lehçeniz vara benziyor. Tercüme etmek ister misin?"
languages.original_text: "You have your own unique dialect here, it seems. Would you care to translate?"

traits.locale_text: "Burada kendinize has bir lehçeniz vara benziyor. Tercüme etmek ister misin?"

languages.text: «Parece que tienen su propio dialecto aquí. ¿Puede traducirlo?».
languages.original_text: "You have your own unique dialect here, it seems. Would you care to translate?"

traits.locale_text: «Parece que tienen su propio dialecto aquí. ¿Puede traducirlo?».

languages.text: “你们这儿似乎有自己独特的方言。可以翻译一下吗？”
languages.original_text: "You have your own unique dialect here, it seems. Would you care to translate?"

traits.locale_text: “你们这儿似乎有自己独特的方言。可以翻译一下吗？”

languages.text: "Ihr scheint hier Euren eigenen Dialekt zu sprechen. Würde Ihr bitte übersetzen?"
languages.original_text: "You have your own unique dialect here, it seems. Would you care to translate?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr scheint hier Euren eigenen Dialekt zu sprechen. Würde Ihr bitte übersetzen?"
